name: hkx-typescript-build-fix
description: TypeScript/JavaScript build/type failure recovery: minimal fix via build-error-resolver, then TS + general residual-risk review.

chain.label: Unblock TS/JS build
chain.task:
Fix TypeScript/JavaScript build and type errors for:

{task}

Rules:
- Sole writer for the active worktree.
- Minimal diffs only; no architecture or feature changes.
- Prefer local evidence (tsc/vite/next/jest diagnostics, package scripts) over broad rewrites.
- Re-run the failing build/typecheck/test commands and report remaining failures.
- Avoid `as any`, non-null assertions, or deleted checks just to silence the compiler unless proven necessary.

Return root causes, changed files, commands run, and remaining failures.

parallel.label: TS safety
Minimal-fix review
Silent failures
